questions.question: Which Tennis player became the first to enter semi-finals after defeating Rafael Nadal?
questions.explanation: Austrian Tennis star Dominic Thiem became the first player to move into the semi-finals of the ATP Finals event in London.He beat world No 2 Rafael Nadal in a high-quality match with a tie-break. Stefanos Tsitsipas, who beat Andrey Rublev will face Nadal and the winner will join Thiem in the semi-finals.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry launched ‘Development of Wind Parks/Wind-Solar Hybrid Park’?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers welfare

answer.label: A
answer.text: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

questions.explanation: The Union Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE) has proposed the scheme of ‘Development of Wind Parks/Wind-Solar Hybrid Park’.The Ministry has also sought feedbacks for developing wind and wind-solar hybrid parks in the country. The scheme with proper infrastructure including evacuation facilities in place has been proposed, to speed up installation of wind power projects.

questions.question: Which district has been selected for the ‘Best Marine District’ award by the Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying?
questions.explanation: Krishna district of Andhra Pradesh has been selected for the ‘Best Marine District’ award, by the Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying.Kalahandi of Odisha as Best Inland District and Nagaon of Assam had been declared as Best Hilly and North Eastern District. The award would be presented at the World Fisheries Day 2020 celebrations at New Delhi.

questions.question: What is the name of the alliance comprised of 5 countries- Australia, USA, Canada, New Zealand, and UK?
questions.explanation: The Five Eyes is an intelligence alliance comprising Australia, Canada, New Zealand, the United Kingdom and the United States.It was first formed during the post-World War II times. Under the coalition, there have been joint signals intelligence collection and sharing. The 5 countries hold ministerial consultations regularly on various security issues.

questions.question: Competition Commission of India has approved acquisition of Future Group by which company?
questions.explanation: Competition Commission of India (CCI) has approved the acquisition of retail, wholesale, logistics & warehousing businesses of Future Group by Reliance Retail Ventures Ltd and Reliance Retail and Fashion Lifestyle Ltd.In the month of August this year, Reliance Industries Ltd (RIL) acquired the businesses of Kishore Biyani’s Future Group for Rs 24,713 crore. After the approval, RIL will have access to around 1800 retail stores of Future Group.

questions.question: The agreement to establish African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA), which was seen in the news, was signed in which year?
questions.explanation: The Agreement establishing an African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA) was signed in 2018, in Kigali, Rwanda.The AfCFTA is expected to become operational on 1 January 2021, which will be the world’s largest free trade area by number of countries. It will also create a single African market for goods and services. Africa Industrialization Day is celebrated on November 20 every year.

questions.question: Which day is celebrated to mark the adoption of the Declaration and the Convention on children’s rights by the UN General Assembly?
questions.explanation: The United Nations General Assembly adopted the Declaration of the Rights of the Child on November 21, 1959. On the same date, UNGA adopted the Convention on the Rights of the Child in the year 1989.World Children’s Day is celebrated on 20 November each year, to promote awareness among children worldwide and improving children’s welfare. The Day also marks the anniversary of the date that the UNGA adopted both the Declaration and the Convention on children’s rights.

questions.question: Which state’s Governor has signed ordinance to curb abusing of women and children via social media?
questions.explanation: Kerala Governor Arif Mohammad Khan has signed an ordinance amending the Kerala Police Act. It is expected to empower the law enforcement to prosecute persons who exploit social media to target women and children.In October, the State cabinet had decided to amend the Act to recommend five years of imprisonment and a fine of ₹10,000 for those convicted of producing, publishing or disseminating derogatory content to intimidate any person through social media.

questions.question: The United States has signed an agreement with which country to establish annual economic talks for five years?
questions.explanation: The US and Taiwan signed an agreement to establish annual economic talks for five years. The agreement can be extended another five years once the current pact is over.This pact has been signed amidst the objections expressed by China to the support of the US for Taipei. ‘Economic Prosperity Partnership Dialogue with Taiwan’ was also launched, to promote cooperation.

questions.question: Indian-origin economist and author Lord Meghnad Desai has resigned from a major party in which country, citing racism?
questions.explanation: Indian-origin economist and author Lord Meghnad Desai has resigned as a member of the UK’s Opposition Labour Party, over its failure to tackle racism.The 80-year-old peer was against the readmission of former party leader Jeremy Corbyn without apology, after being suspended. The Labour Party has been alleged of antisemitism over several years.
